faqData.question: What time should I arrive?
faqData.answer: We’d love to see you between 2:00 PM and 3:00PM! Giving yourself a little extra time ensures you’ll find a great seat before the ceremony begins.

faqData.question: Can I bring a plus one?
faqData.answer: As much as we’d love to celebrate with everyone, our venue has a limited capacity. We have reserved seats specifically for those named on your invitation and truly appreciate your understanding!

faqData.question: What if I can't make it?
faqData.answer: You will be missed! If your plans change, please kindly let us know as soon as possible via Facebook Messenger or at historillopatriciaann@gmail.com and domnikko.neg@gmail.com

faqData.question: Can I take photos?
faqData.answer: Yes, please! Capture all the love you see. All we ask is that you kindly stay clear of the center aisle so our professional photographers can work their magic.
